text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem ACCESSTrackCS

This case-sensitive code system https://dsacms.github.io/cmmi-access-model/CodeSystem/ACCESSTrackCS defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
eCKM Early Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic trackEarly Cardio-kidney-metabolic conditions, including hypertension (high blood pressure), dyslipidemia (high or abnormal lipids, including cholesterol), obesity or overweight with marker of central obesity, and prediabetes.
CKM Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic trackCardio-kidney-metabolic conditions, including diabetes, chronic kidney disease (3a or 3b), and atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease, including heart disease.
MSK Musculoskeletal trackMusculoskeletal conditions, including chronic musculoskeletal pain.
BH Behavioral Health trackBehavioral health conditions, including depression and anxiety.

name: ACCESSTrackCS
title: ACCESS Model Tracks
description: This codesystem defines codes for each of the ACCESS Model tracks.
